lessons.title: Colors in Spanish
lessons.content: Red: Rojo, Blue: Azul, Green: Verde, Yellow: Amarillo.

lessons.title: Numbers 1-10
lessons.content: 1: Uno, 2: Dos, 3: Tres, 4: Cuatro, 5: Cinco, 6: Seis, 7: Siete, 8: Ocho, 9: Nueve, 10: Diez.

lessons.title: Greetings
lessons.content: Hello: Hola, Hi: Buenas, Goodbye: Adiós.

lessons.title: Days of the Week
lessons.content: Monday: Lunes, Tuesday: Martes, Wednesday: Miércoles, Thursday: Jueves, Friday: Viernes, Saturday: Sábado, Sunday: Domingo.

lessons.title: Family Members
lessons.content: Mother: Madre, Father: Padre, Brother: Hermano, Sister: Hermana.

lessons.title: Basic Verbs
lessons.content: To be: Ser, To have: Tener, To go: Ir, To do: Hacer.

lessons.title: School Objects
lessons.content: Pen: Bolígrafo, Book: Libro, Notebook: Cuaderno, Chair: Silla.

lessons.title: Common Phrases
lessons.content: How are you?: ¿Cómo estás?, Thank you: Gracias, Please: Por favor.

lessons.title: Food Vocabulary
lessons.content: Bread: Pan, Cheese: Queso, Apple: Manzana, Water: Agua.

lessons.title: Simple Sentences
lessons.content: I am happy: Estoy feliz, I have a book: Tengo un libro.

lessons.title: Travel Phrases
lessons.content: Where is…?: ¿Dónde está…?, I need help: Necesito ayuda.

lessons.title: Advanced Expressions
lessons.content: Better late than never: Más vale tarde que nunca, It's raining cats and dogs: Llueve a cántaros.
